title: ORM Integration with Express Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on integrating ORMs with the Express.js framework.

questions.question: Where should database models typically be stored in a well-organized Express.js application?
To avoid multiple connections, where should the database be initialized in your project?
options: Once during application startup (e.g., in an index.js within the 'models/' directory)

questions.question: Which of these is a valid way to retrieve a user by ID in an Express route using Sequelize?
What's an important part of connection management for an Express server?
options: Connecting to the database on every request
Ensuring the server only starts after a successful database connection
Starting the server regardless of a successful connection
Manually closing the connection after every query

questions.question: Why is it best to use 'async/await' when performing ORM operations within Express routes?
options: To block other requests until the current one finishes
To avoid 'callback hell' and handle asynchronous database operations cleanly
It is not needed; simple functions are better
